adultAltarText: An awakening voice from the Sacred&Realm will call those destined to be&Sages, who dwell in the five temples.^$8Forest Temple...^$3Shadow Temple...^$4Jabu-Jabu's Belly...^$5Link's Pocket...^$6Spirit Temple...^$7Deku Tree...^$lThe awakened ones will await&for the Hero to collect&6 Spiritual Stones and Medallions.^$bAnd the %revil one%w's key will&be kept in a big chest&%rinside its tower%w.^$kTogether with the Hero of Time,&the awakened ones will return&the light of peace to the world...
childAltarText: 3 Spiritual Stones found in Hyrule...^$0Dodongo's Cavern...^$1Water Temple...^$2Fire Temple...^$cYe who may become a Hero...&Stand with the Ocarina and&play the Song of Time.
ganonHintText: Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me&by reflecting my lightning bolts&and unleashing the arrows from the&Graveyard!
ganonText: After what you did to Koholint&Island, how can you call me the&bad guy?

hints.DMC Gossip Stone: They say that Arrows (30 pieces)&can be found at Goron City.
hints.DMC Upper Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that a crate in a&valley hides Arrows (10&pieces).
hints.DMT Gossip Stone: They say that a Purple Rupee can&be found at outside Ganon's&Castle.
hints.DMT Storms Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Deku Nuts (5&pieces) can be found at Ice&Cavern.
hints.Dodongo's Cavern Gossip Stone: They say that hidden behind a wall&on a mountain trail is a Deku&Shield.
hints.Fairy Gossip Stone: They say that the Light Trial&was dispelled by Sheik.
hints.GC Maze Gossip Stone: They say that a hero ventures&beyond the wasteland to learn a&Piece of Heart.
hints.GC Medigoron Gossip Stone: They say that a ravaged village&mourns with a Big Poe Bottle.
hints.GV Gossip Stone: They say that OTR stands for&Off the Rack
hints.GY Gossip Stone: They say that the Fire Trial was&dispelled by Sheik.
hints.HC Malon Gossip Stone: They say that Bombs (5 pieces)&can be found at Temple of Time.
hints.HC Rock Wall Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 50 Gold&Skulltulas reveals the Biggoron&Sword.
hints.HC Storms Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that on a rooftop in the&desert lies a Purple Rupee.
hints.HF Cow Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that the Ocarina of&Time teaches a Blue Rupee.
hints.HF Near Market Gossip Stone: They say that a Strength Upgrade&can be found at the Lost Woods.
hints.HF Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that Bottom of the Well&hoards Bombchus (5 pieces).
hints.HF Southeast Gossip Stone: They say that plundering Temple&of Time is a foolish choice.
hints.Jabu Gossip Stone: They say that OTR stands for&One Touch Recording
hints.KF Deku Tree Left Gossip Stone: Gorons are stupid. They eat rocks.
hints.KF Deku Tree Right Gossip Stone: They say that Fire Temple hoards&the Minuet of Forest.
hints.KF Gossip Stone: They say that plundering outside&Ganon's Castle is a foolish&choice.
hints.KF Storms Gossip Stone: They say that a Purple Rupee can&be found at Goron City.
hints.Kak Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that the treasure thrown&by Princess Zelda is Bombs (10&pieces).
hints.LH Lab Gossip Stone: They say that the Graveyard is&on the way of the hero.
hints.LH Southeast Gossip Stone: They say that a Piece of Heart&can be found at the Lost Woods.
hints.LH Southwest Gossip Stone: They say that Ice Cavern hoards&a Piece of Heart.
hints.LW Gossip Stone: They say that a Piece of Heart&can be found at Desert Colossus.
hints.LW Near Shortcuts Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 40 Gold&Skulltulas reveals a Piece of&Heart.
hints.SFM Maze Lower Gossip Stone: They say that Goron City is on&the way of the hero.
hints.SFM Maze Upper Gossip Stone: They say that plundering Sacred&Forest Meadow is a foolish&choice.
hints.SFM Saria Gossip Stone: They say that the Lost Woods is&on the way of the hero.
hints.ToT Left Center Gossip Stone: They say that those who dive for&Zora rupees will find a Purple&Rupee.
hints.ToT Left Gossip Stone: They say that Arrows (30 pieces)&can be found at Kakariko&Village.
hints.ToT Right Center Gossip Stone: They say that a Piece of Heart&can be found at Hyrule Castle.
hints.ToT Right Gossip Stone: They say that the nightly builds&may be unstable.
hints.ZD Gossip Stone: They say that the final reward&from the Frogs of Zora's River&is Ruto's Letter.
hints.ZR Near Domain Gossip Stone: They say that OTR stands for&On Time Reporting
hints.ZR Near Grottos Gossip Stone: They say that ReDead in the&Composers' Grave guard an Ice&Trap.
hints.ZR Open Grotto Gossip Stone: They say that slaying 30 Gold&Skulltulas reveals a Wallet.
